observation.message: Environment reset. Incident channel is open.
alerts: NOTICE: no hard alert, but incident investigation is still active.

logs.message: Level 3 incident initialized.

registered_tools.name: check_logs
registered_tools.description: Inspect partial logs, process table, alerts, policy, and metric bands.

registered_tools.name: restart_service
registered_tools.description: Propose restarting a named service such as frontend, api, or db.

registered_tools.name: scale_infrastructure
registered_tools.description: Propose adding resource units to reduce pressure at a recurring cost.

registered_tools.name: modify_permissions
registered_tools.description: Propose opening, closing, or changing a permission boundary.

cost_model.cost_formula: close_port_cost only for close_port; opening risky ports may trigger security penalties

registered_tools.name: rollback_release
registered_tools.description: Propose rolling back the latest application release.

registered_tools.name: cleanup_disk
registered_tools.description: Propose cleaning temporary data without deleting audit logs.

registered_tools.name: rotate_secret
registered_tools.description: Propose rotating a leaked application secret.

registered_tools.name: apply_rate_limit
registered_tools.description: Propose adding rate limits to trade throughput for stability.

registered_tools.name: do_nothing
registered_tools.description: Spend one step without changing the system.

registered_tools.name: audit_proposal
registered_tools.description: Approve or veto the current Fixer proposal as Banker or Shield.

banker: Veto proposals with terminal_budget_risk or critical budget_post_action.
shield: Veto root access and ports that violate the active policy manifest.

active.name: Policy Drift During Incident
active.fault_model: The network policy changes mid-episode and port 80 becomes restricted.
active.hidden_objective: Refresh the world model before approving permission changes.
active.judge_story: Shield must catch a rule change before an unsafe proposal executes.

curriculum.name: Leaking API Worker
curriculum.fault_model: A backend worker leaks memory while metrics fluctuate with harmless noise.
curriculum.hidden_objective: Rollback the faulty release instead of repeatedly restarting symptoms.
curriculum.judge_story: The agent must identify a real root cause from partial logs and process rows.

curriculum.name: Traffic Spike Under Budget Pressure
curriculum.fault_model: A traffic burst increases CPU, latency, disk churn, and recurring spend risk.
curriculum.hidden_objective: Stabilize the service without blindly buying capacity forever.
curriculum.judge_story: Banker must reason about immediate and recurring cost before approvals.

curriculum.name: Policy Drift During Incident
curriculum.fault_model: The network policy changes mid-episode and port 80 becomes restricted.
curriculum.hidden_objective: Refresh the world model before approving permission changes.
curriculum.judge_story: Shield must catch a rule change before an unsafe proposal executes.

entries.name: uptime
entries.objective: maximize service health while incident response continues

entries.name: resource_cost
entries.objective: discourage expensive or recurring-capacity shortcuts

entries.name: security
entries.objective: penalize unsafe permissions and open security flags

entries.name: root_cause_progress
entries.objective: reward fixing the hidden root cause rather than symptoms

entries.name: anti_gaming
entries.objective: penalize invalid actions, duplicate proposals, and do-nothing loops

entries.name: negligent_audit
entries.objective: assign responsibility for reckless approvals

entries.name: terminal
entries.objective: reward clean recovery and penalize terminal failures

action.rationale: API memory is rising, so rollback targets the likely root cause.
